ItacPersonItem.Notes: Translated into Latin some of Galileo`s works. Governor of Montepulciano and Livorno. It is not clear whether he became member of the Lincei in 1614. See Gabrieli, Contributi, I, p. 449.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
